commitResults.messageTitle: Enlarge model diagrams to fix rendering issues on Developer Guide
commitResults.messageBody:
- Increase ModelClassDiagram display width from 650px to 800px
- Increase BetterModelClassDiagram display width from 650px to 700px
- Upgrade PlantUML scale from 1.2 to 1.5 for both diagrams

This improves diagram visibility and clarity while ensuring the right
edge is not cut off when rendered on the Jekyll website. Higher scale
produces crisper diagram exports at the larger display widths.

commitResults.messageTitle: Removed extra maxMessageSize fields from UML diagrams
Add phone and email constraints for add/edit commands in UG
commitResults.messageBody:
- Add explicit phone constraints: digits only, 3-15 digits
- Add explicit email constraints matching app validation logic
- Clarify that the same constraints apply to edit command inputs

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix missing y in DOB error
Rename data file to be lower case in DG
